content.claim: Teacher-level readiness for SNI inclusion is recognized in Hungarian research as influenced by variables including years in profession, special-education in-service training, class size, number of integrated SNI students, school location, subject specialization, and gender, but effect sizes and current readiness levels for Hungary are not available in retrieved sources.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: The specific empirical findings (effect directions and magnitudes) of the doctoral study were not retrieved
No conclusion can be drawn about whether Hungarian teachers currently report adequate or inadequate support for inclusion
This represents a specific evidentiary gap for targeted further research
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
